theme_strategy: Dark mode default, with a highly polished light mode toggle. Avoid pure black; use a very deep charcoal.

typography.rationale: Chivo provides a bold, structured editorial look that avoids the generic feel of Inter. Manrope is highly legible and warm. JetBrains Mono adds a technical, precise flair for metadata.

visual_enhancers.noise_grain: Implement a fixed overlay with 'pointer-events: none' using a base64 SVG noise pattern. Opacity 4% (dark) / 6% (light).
visual_enhancers.ambient_geometry: Use pure CSS/SVG for ambient elements. Specifically, a large thin-line hexagon rotating slowly in the hero section.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Navigation bar MUST use backdrop-blur-xl and background color at 70% opacity. Add a 1px bottom border.

components.Navbar: Sticky top, minimal. Left: Sparkle logo + Name. Right: Home, About, Projects, Resume + Theme toggle.

Buttons.Primary: Pill-shaped (rounded-full), solid background, font-medium, hover scale down 0.98.

components.Chips: For tech stack/skills. text-xs, JetBrains Mono, rounded-full, 1px border.
components.Timeline: For experience. Vertical 1px line, with small square nodes.

Home.left: col-span-12 md:col-span-7 flex flex-col justify-center. Large greeting ('Hello, I\'m Rajiv Pandit' in Chivo text-5xl to text-6xl+).
Home.right: col-span-12 md:col-span-5 flex justify-center items-center. Animated hexagon SVG.

About.sections: Bio, Experience Timeline (3 roles at Indusnet), Education, Skills (grouped by category).

Projects.cards: Minimalist rectangular cards, 1px border, transparent bg. Title, description, chips, 'View' link.

Resume.structure: Centered, narrow column. Document summary + prominent 'Download via Google Drive' button.

motion.scrolling: Smooth scrolling via CSS or Lenis.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA/WCAG AA standards.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use JavaScript (.js, .jsx) files only, NO TypeScript.
Do NOT use pure black or pure white backgrounds, use the defined palette.
No purple-violet gradients. Strictly monochrome editorial tech style.
Implement the animated hexagon completely using CSS/SVG.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to all interactive elements.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
Avoid generic centered layouts and simplistic gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements and glass-morphism.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
